FlashForge presets for OrcaSlicer, extracted from Flash Studio 1.7.8.

**Easiest:** download your printer's `.orca_printer` bundle below and import it in
OrcaSlicer (File → Import → Import Configs…) — printer + all its filaments +
processes in one go.

Or grab `flashforge-orca-presets-<tag>.zip` for every loose preset plus the
build-plate art. See the README for which files to pick.
